replies.msg: 我推介本書，成本書一個project，用python起個簡單website。上官網有solution下载

我覺得自己係腦殘智障, 第一份assignment 都做唔到
請問可唔可以幫我睇下Part C咩事?

https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-0001-introduction-to-computer-science-and-programming-in-python-fall-2016/assignments/MIT6_0001F16_ps1.pdf

annual_salary=int(input("Please enter annual salary: "))

m=0
low=0
high=10000
epsilon=100
semi_annual=0.07
i_return=0.04
house=250000
total_save=0
step=0

while True:
  
  portion_saved=int((high+low)/2)
  total_save=0
  month_salary=annual_salary/12
  m=0
  for m in range(1,37):
            
    if m%6==0:
      month_salary=month_salary*(1+semi_annual)
    else:
      month_salary=month_salary 
    month_save=month_salary*portion_saved/10000
    current_save=total_save*(1+(i_return/12))
    total_save=current_save+month_save
  step+=1
  if abs(total_save-house)<=epsilon:
    print("Best saving rate: ","{:0.4}".format(portion_saved/10000))
    print("Step of Search: ",step)
    break
  elif abs(total_save-house)>epsilon:
    
    if total_save>house:
      high=portion_saved
      
    else:
      low=portion_saved
      
  if low>=high:
    print("It's not possible to pay down payment in 3 years.")
    break

replies.msg:
Sorry
個case 係叫我用bi-section search, 做一個計算程式:
1.你人工年薪係X,月薪即係X/12, 而你每半年會加一次人工7%;
2.你每個月會張月薪某個%(Y)存入銀行, 年回報係4%, 呢到佢當每月回報(4%/12);
3.一開始係0, 你要用3年(即係36個月)時間, 要儲夠$250000 +/- 100 (即係 249900 ~ 250100)
而份功課要求我地輸入X: (即係年薪), 佢會計出
1) Y:(即係每個月要存人工幾多%, 3年後就夠249900 ~ 250100);及
2) 做左幾多次bi-section search;
如果冇可能係3年內存夠250000, 要出"Not possible "

佢份功課有埋test case, 但我試黎試去唔知錯咩, 出唔到佢個結果:
Test Case 1 >>>
Enter the starting salary: 150000
Best savings rate: 0.4411
Steps in bisection search: 12
Test Case 2 >>>
Enter the starting salary: 300000
Best savings rate: 0.2206
Steps in bisection search: 9
Test Case 3 >>>
Enter the starting salary: 10000
It is not possible to pay the down payment in three years.

  if abs(total_save-house)<=epsilon:
    print("Best saving rate: ","{:0.4}".format(portion_saved/10000))
    print("Step of Search: ",step)
    break
  elif abs(total_save-house)>epsilon:
    
    if total_save>house:
      high=portion_saved
      
    else:
      low=portion_saved
      
  if low>=high:
    print("It's not possible to pay down payment in 3 years.")
    break

唔好淨係貼一堆code然後expect人地慢慢睇返咩事

個case 係叫我用bi-section search, 做一個計算程式:
1.你人工年薪係X,月薪即係X/12, 而你每半年會加一次人工7%;
2.你每個月會張月薪某個%(Y)存入銀行, 年回報係4%, 呢到佢當每月回報(4%/12);
3.一開始係0, 你要用3年(即係36個月)時間, 要儲夠$250000 +/- 100 (即係 249900 ~ 250100)
而份功課要求我地輸入X: (即係年薪), 佢會計出
1) Y:(即係每個月要存人工幾多%, 3年後就夠249900 ~ 250100);及
2) 做左幾多次bi-section search;
如果冇可能係3年內存夠250000, 要出"Not possible "

另外，個end case有問題
假設low == high - 1, 個portion_saved = int((high + low)/2)永遠都會等於返low，會出infinite loop

呢個係我自己試的result, 我又執左少少但都係出唔到test case 個數, 請問可唔可以幫我睇解唔同?:
case 1
Please enter annual salary: 150000
Best saving rate: 0.436 (應該係 0.4411)
Step of Search: 11
case 2
Please enter annual salary: 300000
Best saving rate: 0.218 (應該係 0.2206)
Step of Search: 13

我份code 係下邊:



annual_salary=int(input("Please enter annual salary: "))

m=0
low=0
high=10000
epsilon=100
semi_annual=0.07
i_return=0.04
house=250000
total_save=0
step=0
control=True
while True:
  
  portion_saved=int((high+low)/2)
  total_save=0
  month_salary=annual_salary/12
  m=0
  for m in range(1,37):
            
    if m%6==0:
      month_salary=month_salary*(1+semi_annual)
    else:
      month_salary=month_salary 
    month_save=month_salary*portion_saved/10000
    current_save=total_save*(1+(i_return/12))
    total_save=current_save+month_save
  step+=1
  if low+1==10000:
    print("It's not possible to pay down payment in 3 years.")
    break  
  if abs(total_save-house)<=epsilon:
    print("Best saving rate: ","{:0.4}".format(portion_saved/10000))
    print("Step of Search: ",step)
    break
  elif abs(total_save-house)>epsilon:
    
    if total_save>house:
      high=portion_saved
    elif total_save
      low=portion_saved

個人認為學寫code 唔應該一開始就學scripting language 姐係python 好易搞到自己好亂 例如個variable 裝緊咩data type

一開始學java 最好，由data type, condition control, method學起 之後再到OOP

最好學埋少少design pattern先 學左先會比較易明OOP嘅polymorphism

學齊先再學scripting language 之後你就會發現隻隻language 都差唔多樣 個時學program就學佢專有嘅component 或者architecture

最好學埋少少design pattern先 學左先會比較易明OOP嘅polymorphism

學齊先再學scripting language 之後你就會發現隻隻language 都差唔多樣 個時學program就學佢專有嘅component 或者architecture

Bro,我本身份工同IT/data analysis 都冇關, 但我係想學多少少野。
我而家睇緊MIT Open course CS6001, 之後想睇埋CS6002
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-0001-introduction-to-computer-science-and-programming-in-python-fall-2016/
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-0002-introduction-to-computational-thinking-and-data-science-fall-2016/
最終我係想學下點攞、管理同運算D資料或者數據。

replies.msg:
搵個要用programming解決既問題，之後去用學既programming解決佢，當初就係咁一個星期學哂Python basics，你空泛地死記佢啲符號好難學架。

如果Data Analysis就要學numpy, pandas, statisticmodel呢啲Python Package。R都要學，因為可多statistical model都係R搵到，而Ptython有package 可以係python call R library。

其實scripting language根本個定義好空泛，所以斟酌黎無意思，重點係快定慢，而一個language本身係唔會有快慢，快慢取決於佢既implementation，implementation姐係點將你寫既high level code translate做machine code，而現時主要既python implementation有CPython 同PyPy。

CPython係最主流，絕大部份人用佢，亦係由Python Language作者所設立，佢既更新亦係最貼近最新版本既Python language（注意⚠️language！= implementation），一般黎講運行速度唔快。

而PyPy就係另一個implementation，佢有JIT compiler，所以速度快好多，幾乎接近Java，但唔係主流，會有啲Package run唔到，亦唔貼近最新Python Language。

無論咩implementation都好，Python最大吸引處在於個community，大部分既問題，9成8都有人寫好左Package例如numpy同pandas都係用C寫，分別專門處理數字同data wrangling，適當使用會有唔錯速度。

唔好意思，又 有問題問。
我而家用緊anaconda 入邊個 spyder 去學python3 ，想問下點樣先可以用到 flask? 即係好似可以整個網頁interface 出黎
